infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Fellito listens for the wake word Hey Fellito and accepts voice input during Go-Live support sessions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Upload Go-Live orientation documents from your photo library.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Fellito uses speech recognition to detect the Hey Fellito wake word and process voice questions during Go-Live support.

plugins.microphonePermission: Fellito listens for the Hey Fellito wake word and processes voice questions during Go-Live support.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Fellito uses speech recognition to detect the Hey Fellito wake word and answer your questions hands-free.
